headline: Is Texas Instruments Incorporated (TXN) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: We came across a bullish thesis on Texas Instruments Incorporated on Arya’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on TXN. Texas Instruments Incorporated’s share was trading at $202.67 as of March 3rd. TXN’s trailing and forward P/E were 38.50 and 31.85 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Texas Instruments Incorporated designs, manufactures, and sells semiconductors […]
